chapter_title.ar: بَابُ فَضْلِ الْإِيمَانِ عَلَى الْإِسْلَامِ وَ الْيَقِينِ عَلَى الْإِيمَانِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 26 – Superiority of the Emān over Al-Islām, and the (superiority of the) conviction over the Emān

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور معتبر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (325/ 7)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور معتبر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (325/ 7)
text: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ الْإِيمَانُ فَوْقَ الْإِسْلَامِ بِدَرَجَةٍ وَ التَّقْوَى فَوْقَ الْإِيمَانِ بِدَرَجَةٍ وَ الْيَقِينُ فَوْقَ التَّقْوَى بِدَرَجَةٍ وَ مَا قُسِمَ فِي النَّاسِ شَيْ‏ءٌ أَقَلُّ مِنَ الْيَقِينِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, and Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, altogether from Al Washha,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassanasws, said, ‘I heard himasws saying: ‘The Emān is above the Islām by a level, and ‘التَّقْوَى’ the piety is above the Emān by a level, and ‘الْيَقِينَ’ the conviction is above ‘التَّقْوَى’ the piety by a level, and nothing has been distributed among the people as scarcely than ‘الْيَقِينَ’ the conviction’.
en.sarwar: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad and al-Husayn ibn Muhammad from Mu’alla ibn Muhammad all from al-Washsha’ who has said the following: “I heard abu Al-Hassan (a.s.) saying, ‘Belief is above Islam by one degree. Piety is above belief by one degree. Certainty is above piety by one degree. Nothing is distributed so little among people as certainty is.’”
